title: nephrolepis genyi
intro: Nephrolepis genyi, also known as the Lady Fern or Boston Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Nephrolepis genyi can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
